schedule.description: STORY 2: Series preview — Cubs at Reds Game 1
STORY 6: Trade deadline 24 days — Joe Ryan
STORY 7: Pre-game hype — first pitch Cincinnati

stories.title: Orioles 3, Cubs 2 — Game 3 Recap
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP — Bullpen lost it in the 8th. Rolison gave up the go-ahead two-run double to Jackson. Suzuki drove in both Cubs runs. Cubs still took the series 2-of-3. Now on to Cincinnati.

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Orioles 3, Cubs 2. Rolison couldn't hold it in the 8th — Jackson's two-run double put Baltimore in front to stay.

Suzuki had driven in both Cubs runs. Bullpen didn't hold it.

Cubs take the series 2-of-3. Cincinnati is next — 6:10 PM CT tonight.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Cubs at Reds — Game 1 Series Preview
stories.angle: NEW STORY — is_series_start_today=true. Cubs (52-41, NL WC leaders) at Reds (42-50) at Great American Ball Park. Imanaga takes the ball tonight. This is a series the Cubs need to win.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Cubs at Reds — Game 1 of 3 at Great American Ball Park. 6:10 PM CT tonight.

Reds are 42-50. Cubs are 52-41 and leading the NL wild card.

Shota Imanaga takes the ball against a team trying to stay afloat. This is a series the Cubs need to take.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: PCA — First 20/20 of 2026, Heading to the All-Star Game
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP — After July 8's two-HR night, PCA is at 21 HR. First player in 2026 with 20 HR and 20 SB. MLB-leading WAR (~5.8). Lone Cubs All-Star, heading to Philadelphia July 14. Bold take: best player in baseball right now.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong: 21 home runs. First player in the majors with 20 home runs and 20 stolen bases this season.

MLB-leading WAR. Headed to Philadelphia for the All-Star Game on July 14.

He's the best player in baseball right now.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: Wild Card Standings — Cubs Leading the Race
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP — Quick standings snapshot: Cubs 52-41 No. 1 NL WC, Phillies and Marlins right behind, Cardinals have faded. Cubs went from chasing this race to owning it. Next stop Cincinnati.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Wild card check-in, July 10:

Cubs 52-41 — NL WC leaders
Phillies right behind them
Marlins holding the third spot
Cardinals have faded

The Cubs went from chasing this race to owning it. Next stop: Cincinnati.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Reinforcements Coming — Taillon, Shaw, Maton
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP — Taillon heading for second rehab start, expected back in rotation by July 17. Shaw returns post-All-Star break. Maton healthy at Iowa, could return this weekend. The cavalry is almost here.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Reinforcements are coming.

Jameson Taillon: second rehab start expected this week, back in the rotation by July 17.
Matt Shaw: returns after the All-Star break.
Phil Maton: healthy at Iowa, could rejoin the bullpen this weekend.

The cavalry is almost here.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Trade Deadline — 24 Days, Joe Ryan
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP — August 3 deadline is 24 days away. Joe Ryan (Twins, 3.36 ERA, controlled through 2027) remains the best fit. A healthy Cubs rotation helps but isn't the answer. Pressure on Hoyer.

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
24 days until August 3.

Joe Ryan (Twins, 3.36 ERA) is still the best fit for what the Cubs need. Control through 2027. A starter who can carry 200 innings.

The healthy Cubs rotation is a bonus. It's not the answer. Jed Hoyer needs to make the call.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: First Pitch Tonight — Cubs at Reds Pre-Game Hype
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Punchy game-time tweet. Imanaga vs Reds. Cubs 52-41, Reds 42-50. Playoff teams take care of these series.

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
First pitch in Cincinnati — 6:10 PM CT.

Shota Imanaga vs the Reds. Cubs 52-41. Reds 42-50. This is exactly the kind of series playoff teams take care of before the break.

Win it.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
